ch0312_40_hinatsu/0101_0701_01_10:
Hey, [Name:PlayerNickname ]! I was
waitin’ for you to show up!
ch0312_40_hinatsu/0101_0701_02_10: Let’s have a great time at the beach!
ch0312_40_hinatsu/7101_0701_01_10: I feel so refreshed in this breezy outfit.
ch0312_40_hinatsu/7101_0701_02_10: Isn’t this flower brooch the cutest?
ch0312_40_hinatsu/7102_0701_01_10:
Basculegion can swim against harsh currents,
even while carrying someone.
ch0312_40_hinatsu/7102_0701_02_10:
I bet jumping through the water while riding
Basculegion would feel nice!
ch0312_40_hinatsu/7103_0701_01_10:
Basculegion evolves from a Pokémon called
Basculin, but apparently some Basculin don’t
evolve at all.
ch0312_40_hinatsu/7103_0701_02_10:
I guess Pokémon can take different forms
depending on the place and time.
ch0312_40_hinatsu/7104_0701_01_10:
Since we’re heading to the beach, we might
as well have some fun!
ch0312_40_hinatsu/7104_0701_02_10:
If your hair gets messed up, I can fix it!
C’mon, let’s have a blast!
ch0312_40_hinatsu/7105_0701_01_10:
I can go to the beach whenever I want,
but each time is different, you know?
ch0312_40_hinatsu/7105_0701_02_10:
The color of the sky, the smell of the ocean...
Each time experiencing them is special.
ch0312_40_hinatsu/7105_0701_03_10:
That’s why you should cherish the here and
now, [Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0312_40_hinatsu/1701_0701_01_10:
Oh, hey! What a coincidence. I wanted to
give this to you!
ch0312_40_hinatsu/1701_0702_01_10: I’m sure you’ll use it well.
ch0312_40_hinatsu/2501_0701_01_10:
In the clan I’m part of—the Diamond Clan—
there’s a warden called Iscan.
ch0312_40_hinatsu/2501_0701_02_10:
He’s looking after a special Basculegion—a
Ride Pokémon with almighty Sinnoh’s divine
protection.
ch0312_40_hinatsu/2501_0701_03_10:
I wonder if Iscan got help from his
Basculegion like I did.
ch0312_40_hinatsu/2501_0702_01_10:
Come to think of it, how DID Iscan handle
that Basculegion?
ch0312_40_hinatsu/2501_0702_02_10:
I’ve never taken care of this Pokémon,
so I don’t understand much yet.
ch0312_40_hinatsu/2501_0702_03_10:
If I want to be the best possible partner for
Basculegion, I’ve got a lot to learn!
ch0312_40_hinatsu/2511_0701_01_10: An afternoon dip in the ocean is refreshing...
ch0312_40_hinatsu/2511_0701_02_10:
But at night, the beach has its own charm!
I love gazing up at the stars and fireworks.
ch0312_40_hinatsu/2511_0702_01_10:
A firework lasts only a moment, but the
memory of it lasts forever.
ch0312_40_hinatsu/3001_0701_01_10:
Morning! For special occasions, it’s important
to choose the right hairstyle and outfit!
ch0312_40_hinatsu/3003_0701_01_10:
A short, breezy hairstyle can help you beat
the heat! Wanna give one a try?
ch0312_40_hinatsu/3005_0701_01_10:
Great work today! The cool evening breeze
is perfect after a hot day, isn’t it?
